c-study.content:
### Redesigning for Carbon Efficiency

A 2024 redesign project for a mid-sized publishing site (300k monthly visits) targeted carbon reduction as a primary design constraint alongside usability and aesthetics.

**Changes made:**
- Replaced hero video with optimised still image (WebP, 85k vs. 2.1MB)
- Removed autoplay background video on article pages
- Replaced custom web fonts with system font stack for body text
- Optimised all images: WebP, responsive `srcset`, lazy loading
- Removed third-party analytics replaced by privacy-first, lightweight alternative
- Set CSS `prefers-color-scheme: dark` default

**Result before:** 3.2g CO₂ per visit

**Result after:** 0.28g CO₂ per visit

**Reduction: 91%** — without any measurable impact on bounce rate or session duration. The redesigned site also achieved a 40% improvement in LCP.

c-screenshot.alt: Screenshot of redesigned publishing site — system fonts, still image hero, minimal assets
